hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||'';const ts=new Date().toISOString();const line=`${ts} | MODIFIED | ${f}`;const fs=require('fs');const log='CHANGELOG.md';let existing='';try{existing=fs.readFileSync(log,'utf8')}catch{}if(f&&!existing.includes(line.slice(0,40))){fs.writeFileSync(log,existing?existing+'\n'+line:line+'\n')}"
